actual_work_performed: Created two fresh local Canny quality-matrix prompt profiles.
Packaged both profiles through New-WorkflowRunPackage.ps1 with static validation passing at zero defects.
Executed both local ComfyUI run packages and pulled back generated portrait plus diagnostic control-map outputs.
Performed strict whole-image visual QA on every generated output.
Made one QA-driven follow-up profile change after the softer sample drifted.
Executed the minimum one-sample follow-up rerun and rejected it after visual QA showed regression.

rejected_candidates.reason: Identity and hair silhouette drift under softer 0.36/0.52 Canny guidance.
Follow-up did not help; it caused major identity shift and a dark boundary artifact.

next_action: Keep the 0.42/0.60 v3 right-edge-masked Canny settings as the preferred local MOD-17 candidate unless a future one-variable local test beats it. Do not promote the softer or identity-lock follow-up profiles.
